question: Why don't you start to run and see if that helps you lose weight? (up)
correct_answer: take up running and see if

question: I did German lessons until last year, but I stopped because I didn't have time. (used)
correct_answer: German lessons until last year

question: When you make a mistake, put a line through it and write the correct answer above. (cross)
correct_answer: a mistake, cross it out and write

question: Have you played Monopoly before? (time)
correct_answer: first time you've played Monopoly

question: I started studying at six and now it's ten o'clock. (for)
correct_answer: I've been studying for four hours

question: I'm sorry I broke your glasses, Paul, said Stacy. (apologised)
correct_answer: apologised for breaking Paul's glasses

question: When I'm an adult, I want to be a pop star! (up)
correct_answer: grow up, I want to be a pop star

question: Let's leave at seven o'clock tomorrow morning. (set)
correct_answer: set off at seven o'clock tomorrow morning

question: You've really disappointed me, Rachel. (down)
correct_answer: let me down, Rachel

question: They gave me a map of the town center. (provided)
correct_answer: provided me a map of the town center

question: Hurry up or we'll miss the plane! (late)
correct_answer: be late for the plane

question: Did you really go into town by yourself, Sam? (own)
correct_answer: to the town on your own, Sam

question: I don't really like traveling. (fond)
correct_answer: very fond of traveling

question: You need to stop the engine and then check to see if there's any oil on the ground. (turn)

hint.suffix: then check to see if there's any oil on the ground.

correct_answer: turn off the engine and

question: Before the aeroplane was invented, people told stories about flying machines. (made)
correct_answer: people made up stories about flying machines

question: Don't just put your batteries in the bin – recycle them! (away)
correct_answer: throw away your batteries in the bin

question: It took a long time for scientists to discover what stars are made of. (find)

hint.prefix: It took a long time for scientists

correct_answer: to find out what stars are made of

question: I found some old coins in a drawer while I was looking for a pen. (across)

hint.suffix: while I was looking for a pen.

correct_answer: across old coins in a drawer

question: If your watch doesn't work, return it to the shop. (back)
correct_answer: put it back to the shop

question: Our car stopped working last weekend, and I don't know why. (down)
correct_answer: broke down last weekend

question: Did you give Mark the money you borrowed from him? (pay)
correct_answer: pay back the money

question: The magazine is published every Friday. (out)
correct_answer: comes out every Friday

question: Could you complete this application form, please? (in)
correct_answer: fill in this application form, please

question: I am writing with regard to your advertisement for a part-time shop assistant. (response)
correct_answer: in response to your advertisement

question: I don't want to say anything about that. (comment)
correct_answer: comment on that
